description: Oracle Analytics Desktop is open. Using the dataset 'sample_order_lines2023.xlsx' located at C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\OracleAnalyticsData\sample_order_lines2023.xlsx, create a revenue forecast. Generate a line chart visualization showing Revenue by Order Date at the Month granularity. Add a forecast to the visualization projecting exactly 3 periods (months) into the future. Save the resulting workbook as 'Supply_Chain_Forecast'.
